title: Tatars
content: The Tatars (;,;) is an umbrella term for different Turkic ethnic groups bearing the name "Tatar". Initially, the ethnonym "Tatar" possibly referred to the Tatar confederation. That confederation was eventually incorporated into the Mongol Empire when Genghis Khan unified the various steppe tribes. Historically, the term "Tatars" (or "Tartars") was applied to anyone originating from the vast Northern and Central Asia n landmass then known as Tartary.
